semantic_description: The function reads the first character of a caller-owned null-terminated character array segment and returns 1 exactly when s[0] equals the input character c, otherwise returns 0. The control flow is a single if/return branch with no loops. The contract models the string as a list l followed by a null terminator; when n is 0 the first character is the terminator, and when n is positive the first character is l[0]. The function does not modify memory and must preserve the full CharArray resource.
